package service

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for service_imports_gin_directly: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Service packages that depend on `github.com/gin-gonic/gin` instead of transport-neutral inputs.
type CaseServiceImportsGinDirectlyDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseServiceImportsGinDirectlyModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseServiceImportsGinDirectlyRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseServiceImportsGinDirectlyModel
}

type CaseServiceImportsGinDirectlyService struct {
    repo *CaseServiceImportsGinDirectlyRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseServiceImportsGinDirectlyAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeServiceImportsGinDirectly(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseServiceImportsGinDirectlyDTO) error {
    model := CaseServiceImportsGinDirectlyModel{ID: input, Status: "active"}
    if err := db.WithContext(ctx).Save(&model).Error; err != nil {
        return fmt.Errorf("save failed: %w", err)
    }
    return nil
}
